title: the Post Office Time Deposit (Amendment) Rules, 1995.
description: the Post Office Time Deposit (Amendment) Rules, 1995.
text: REGD. NO. D.L.—33004/95 The Gazette Of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 93] NEW DELHI, WEDNESDAY, MARCH 8, 1995/PHALGUNA 17,1916 538 GI/95 (1) -- 1 of 4 -- 2 , THE GAZETTE OF JNDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)J MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Economic Affairs) NOTIFICATION New Dolhi, the 8th March, 1995 C-S.R. 118 (E) :—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section J5 of the Government Savings Banks Act, 1S73 (5 of 1873), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Post Office Time Deposit Rules, 1981, namely :— 1. (1) These ruJes may be called the Post Office Time Deposit (Amendment) Rules, 1995. (2) They shall come into force on the 1st day of April, 1995. 2. In the Post Office Time Deposit Rules, 1981,— (a) in rule 2, under the heading "Delinitions", the clauses (aa), (ab), and (ac) shall be deleted. (b) in rule 4, under the heading "Types of accounts and matters connected therewith'", in the table below sub- rule (2), for the serial number 5A. Other Institutional Accounts and the entries relating thereto, the following shall be substituted, namely :•— "5A. Olher A trust, One or One or Institutional Regimental more more accounts. Fund and accounts persons Welfare authorised Fund. by the authority Controlling the trust or Futid. [F. No. 5/3/94—NS.IK I)] N.P. BAGCHEE, Addl. Secy. Note : The principal rules were published vide GSR 6ft"4(E) dated 17-12-1981 and amended vide GSR 300(E) dated 1-4-1982, GSR 257(E) dated 11-3-1983, GSR 503(E) dated 9-7-1984 and GSR 418(FJ dated 10-5-1985, GSR 193(E) dated 12-2-1986, GSR 362(E) dated 1-4-1987, GSR 100S(E) dated 23-12-1987, GSR 353(E) dated 18-3-1988, GSR 507(7.} dated 23-5-1990, GSR 191(E) dated 27-3-1991, GSR 580rE) dated 12-9-1991, GSR 727(E) dated 6-12-1991, GSR 43 HE) dated 24-4-1992 and GSR 586(E) dated 2-9-1993. NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the Kth March, 1995 G.S.R. 119 (E) :— In exercise of the powers conferred by Section J2 of the Government Savings Certificates Act, 1959 (46 of 1959), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Kisan Vikas I'atra Rules, 1988, namely :— 1. (1) These rules may be called the Kisan Vikas Fatru (Amendment) Rules, 1995. (2) They shall come into force on the 1st day of April, 1995. 2. In the Kisan Vikas Patra Rules, 1988,— in rule 6, under the heading "Types of certificates and issue thereof", for clause (a) of sub rule (2), the following shall be substituted, namely :— "(a) A single Holder Type Certificate ma> be issued to : — (i) an aduh for himself or on behalf of a minor or to a minor, (ii) a trust." fF. No. 5/3.94-NS. II (2)] N. P. BAGCI1EE, Add!. Secy. Note :—The principal rules were published vide notification GSR 37O(E) dated 22-3-1988 and amended vjde GSR 81(£) dated 6-2-1989, GSR 8(F) dated 4-1-1990, GSR 728(E) dated C-12-1991 and GSR 432(E) dated 24-4-1992, GSR 567fE) dated 20-H-1993 and GSR 58WE) dated 2-9-1993. -- 2 of 4 -- 3 NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 8th March, 1995 G.S.R. 120 (E) :—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 12 of the Government Savings Certificates Act, 1959 (46 of 1959), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the National Savings Certi- ficates (VIII Issue) Rules, 1989, namely : — 1. (1) These rules may be called the National Savings Certificates (VIII Issue) (Amcndmenl) Rules, 1995. (2) They shall come into force on the 1st day of April, 1995. 2. In the National Savings Certificates (VIII Issue) Rules, 1989,— (a) in rule|2, under the heading "Definitions", ihe clauses (ii), (v) and (vii) shall be deleted. (b) In rule 4, under the heading "Types of Certificates and issue thereof", for clause (a) of sub rule (2), the following shall be substituted, namely :— "(a) A single Holder Type Certificate may be issued to :—• (i) an adult for himself or on behalf of a minor or to a minor, (ii) a trust." [F. No. 5/3/94-NS. 11(3)] N.P. BAGCHEE, Addl. Secy. Note :—The principal ruks were published vide GSR 49WE) dated 1-5-1989 and amended vide GSR 508(E) dated 23-5-1990.
